title: The Last Name on the List
description: A death-witch can see, written on the back of every hand, the name of the person fated to kill its owner. Tamsin has spent her life reading those names for coin and keeping her own gloves on. The day she finally looks at her own hand, the name written there belongs to the city's most wanted outlaw — a man she has never met, and now cannot stop searching for. Romantasy of fate, choice, and a love that arrives wearing a warning.

chapters.title: The Name on Her Own Hand
